019
020package com.github.tommyettinger.kryo.gdx;
021
022import static com.esotericsoftware.kryo.Kryo.*;
023
024import com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array;
025import com.esotericsoftware.kryo.Kryo;
026import com.esotericsoftware.kryo.Registration;
027import com.esotericsoftware.kryo.Serializer;
028import com.esotericsoftware.kryo.io.Input;
029import com.esotericsoftware.kryo.io.Output;
030
031/** Serializes libGDX {@link Array} objects.
032 * Note that if you use kryo-libgdx, you should not register this ArraySerializer in addition to that library's
033 * ArraySerializer; you should only register that library's ArraySerializer, normally.
034 *
035 * @author Nathan Sweet */
036public class ArraySerializer extends Serializer<Array> {
037        private boolean elementsCanBeNull = true;
038        private Serializer elementSerializer;
039        private Class elementClass;
040
041        public ArraySerializer() {
042                setAcceptsNull(true);
043        }
044
045        /** @param elementsCanBeNull False if all elements are not null. This saves 1 byte per element if elementClass is set. True if
046         *           it is not known (default). */
047        public void setElementsCanBeNull (boolean elementsCanBeNull) {
048                this.elementsCanBeNull = elementsCanBeNull;
049        }
050
051        /** The concrete class of the collection elements, or null if it is not known. This saves 1-2 bytes per element. Only set to a
052         * non-null value if the elements in the collection are known to all be instances of this class (or null). */
053        public void setElementClass (Class elementClass) {
054                this.elementClass = elementClass;
055        }
056
057        public Class getElementClass () {
058                return elementClass;
059        }
060
061        /** Sets both {@link #setElementClass(Class)} and {@link #setElementSerializer(Serializer)}. */
062        public void setElementClass (Class elementClass, Serializer serializer) {
063                this.elementClass = elementClass;
064                this.elementSerializer = serializer;
065        }
066
067        /** The serializer to be used for elements in collection, or null to use the serializer registered with {@link Kryo} for each
068         * element's type. Default is null. */
069        public void setElementSerializer (Serializer elementSerializer) {
070                this.elementSerializer = elementSerializer;
071        }
072
073        public Serializer getElementSerializer () {
074                return this.elementSerializer;
075        }
076
077        public void write (Kryo kryo, Output output, Array collection) {
078                if (collection == null) {
079                        output.writeByte(NULL);
080                        return;
081                }
082
083                int length = collection.size;
084                if (length == 0) {
085                        output.writeByte(1);
086                        writeHeader(kryo, output, collection);
087                        return;
088                }
089
090                boolean elementsCanBeNull = this.elementsCanBeNull;
091                Serializer elementSerializer = this.elementSerializer;
092                if (elementSerializer == null) {
093                        Class genericClass = kryo.getGenerics().nextGenericClass();
094                        if (genericClass != null && kryo.isFinal(genericClass)) elementSerializer = kryo.getSerializer(genericClass);
095                }
096                try {
097                        outer:
098                        if (elementSerializer != null) {
099                                inner:
100                                if (elementsCanBeNull) {
101                                        for (Object element : collection) {
102                                                if (element == null) {
103                                                        output.writeVarIntFlag(true, length + 1, true);
104                                                        break inner;
105                                                }
106                                        }
107                                        output.writeVarIntFlag(false, length + 1, true);
108                                        elementsCanBeNull = false;
109                                } else
110                                        output.writeVarInt(length + 1, true);
111                                writeHeader(kryo, output, collection);
112                        } else { // Serializer is unknown, check if all elements are the same type.
113                                Class elementType = null;
114                                boolean hasNull = false;
115                                for (Object element : collection) {
116                                        if (element == null)
117                                                hasNull = true;
118                                        else if (elementType == null)
119                                                elementType = element.getClass();
120                                        else if (element.getClass() != elementType) { // Elements are different types.
121                                                output.writeVarIntFlag(false, length + 1, true);
122                                                writeHeader(kryo, output, collection);
123                                                break outer;
124                                        }
125                                }
126                                output.writeVarIntFlag(true, length + 1, true);
127                                writeHeader(kryo, output, collection);
128                                if (elementType == null) { // All elements are null.
129                                        output.writeByte(NULL);
130                                        return;
131                                }
132                                // All elements are the same class.
133                                kryo.writeClass(output, elementType);
134                                elementSerializer = kryo.getSerializer(elementType);
135                                if (elementsCanBeNull) {
136                                        output.writeBoolean(hasNull);
137                                        elementsCanBeNull = hasNull;
138                                }
139                        }
140
141                        if (elementSerializer != null) {
142                                if (elementsCanBeNull) {
143                                        for (Object element : collection)
144                                                kryo.writeObjectOrNull(output, element, elementSerializer);
145                                } else {
146                                        for (Object element : collection)
147                                                kryo.writeObject(output, element, elementSerializer);
148                                }
149                        } else {
150                                for (Object element : collection)
151                                        kryo.writeClassAndObject(output, element);
152                        }
153                } finally {
154                        kryo.getGenerics().popGenericType();
155                }
156        }
157
158        /** Can be overidden to write data needed for {@link #create(Kryo, Input, Class, int)}. The default implementation does
159         * nothing. */
160        protected void writeHeader (Kryo kryo, Output output, Array collection) {
161        }
162
163        /** Used by {@link #read(Kryo, Input, Class)} to create the new object. This can be overridden to customize object creation (eg
164         * to call a constructor with arguments), optionally reading bytes written in {@link #writeHeader(Kryo, Output, Array)}.
165         * The default implementation uses {@link Kryo#newInstance(Class)} with special cases for ArrayList and HashSet. */
166        protected Array<?> create (Kryo kryo, Input input, Class<? extends Array> type, int size) {
167                return new Array<>(size);
168        }
169
170        public Array read (Kryo kryo, Input input, Class<? extends Array> type) {
171                Class elementClass = this.elementClass;
172                Serializer elementSerializer = this.elementSerializer;
173                if (elementSerializer == null) {
174                        Class genericClass = kryo.getGenerics().nextGenericClass();
175                        if (genericClass != null && kryo.isFinal(genericClass)) {
176                                elementSerializer = kryo.getSerializer(genericClass);
177                                elementClass = genericClass;
178                        }
179                }
180
181                try {
182                        Array collection;
183                        int length;
184                        boolean elementsCanBeNull = this.elementsCanBeNull;
185                        if (elementSerializer != null) {
186                                if (elementsCanBeNull) {
187                                        elementsCanBeNull = input.readVarIntFlag();
188                                        length = input.readVarIntFlag(true);
189                                } else
190                                        length = input.readVarInt(true);
191                                if (length == 0) return null;
192
193                                length--;
194                                collection = create(kryo, input, type, length);
195                                kryo.reference(collection);
196
197                                if (length == 0) return collection;
198                        } else {
199                                boolean sameType = input.readVarIntFlag();
200                                length = input.readVarIntFlag(true);
201                                if (length == 0) return null;
202
203                                length--;
204                                collection = create(kryo, input, type, length);
205                                kryo.reference(collection);
206
207                                if (length == 0) return collection;
208
209                                if (sameType) {
210                                        Registration registration = kryo.readClass(input);
211                                        if (registration == null) { // All elements are null.
212                                                for (int i = 0; i < length; i++)
213                                                        collection.add(null);
214                                                kryo.getGenerics().popGenericType();
215                                                return collection;
216                                        }
217                                        elementClass = registration.getType();
218                                        elementSerializer = kryo.getSerializer(elementClass);
219                                        if (elementsCanBeNull) elementsCanBeNull = input.readBoolean();
220                                }
221                        }
222
223                        if (elementSerializer != null) {
224                                if (elementsCanBeNull) {
225                                        for (int i = 0; i < length; i++)
226                                                collection.add(kryo.readObjectOrNull(input, elementClass, elementSerializer));
227                                } else {
228                                        for (int i = 0; i < length; i++)
229                                                collection.add(kryo.readObject(input, elementClass, elementSerializer));
230                                }
231                        } else {
232                                for (int i = 0; i < length; i++)
233                                        collection.add(kryo.readClassAndObject(input));
234                        }
235                        return collection;
236                } finally {
237                        kryo.getGenerics().popGenericType();
238                }
239        }
240
241        /** Used by {@link #copy(Kryo, Array)} to create the new object. This can be overridden to customize object creation, eg
242         * to call a constructor with arguments. The default implementation uses {@link Kryo#newInstance(Class)}. */
243        protected Array createCopy (Kryo kryo, Array original) {
244                return new Array(original.ordered, original.size);
245        }
246
247        public Array copy (Kryo kryo, Array original) {
248                Array copy = createCopy(kryo, original);
249                kryo.reference(copy);
250                for (Object element : original)
251                        copy.add(kryo.copy(element));
252                return copy;
253        }
254}
